imaging_request.indication_text: Surveillance CT chest 4 months post-segmentectomy for stage IA NSCLC. Adjuvant therapy not indicated per stage.

clinical_indication.diagnosis_text: Malignant neoplasm of lower lobe, unspecified bronchus
clinical_indication.supporting_notes: Pathologic staging pT1aN0M0, Stage IA. Wedge resection performed 2026-01-15 due to limited pulmonary reserve. No adjuvant therapy indicated for Stage IA per NCCN. SURV-3 criterion (adjuvant therapy documentation) is not applicable to this case.
